# MuleSoft Anypoint MQ Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (4.x) of Anypoint MQ Connector documentation.
> See [Anypoint MQ Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-mq-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Anypoint MQ Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Anypoint MQ ACK and NACK Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-mq-connector/latest/anypoint-mq-ack.md)
- [Anypoint MQ Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-mq-connector/latest/anypoint-mq-connector-reference.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Anypoint MQ Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-mq-connector/latest/anypoint-mq-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Anypoint MQ Consume Operation](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-mq-connector/latest/anypoint-mq-consume.md)
- [Configuring Cross-Region Failover in Your App](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-mq-connector/latest/anypoint-mq-failover.md)
- [Anypoint MQ Subscriber Source](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-mq-connector/latest/anypoint-mq-listener.md)
- [Anypoint MQ Publish Operation](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-mq-connector/latest/anypoint-mq-publish.md)
- [Anypoint MQ Connector Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-mq-connector/latest/index.md)
